backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend canister with portfolio CRUD endpoints (admin-only) and user profile endpoints, using access control mixins and blob storage for portfolio images.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Sulekha Sahoo Portfolio SPA, mounting the React app at the `#root` div and loading the Vite entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for the home page, admin login, and admin dashboard, wrapped in QueryClientProvider and a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: Two-column About Me section with an illustration, bio text, a declaration blockquote, language badges, and scroll-triggered entrance animations.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with contact info cards and a validated contact form featuring loading state, success screen, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/Education.tsx: Vertical alternating timeline section displaying four academic milestones with sky-blue icon markers and staggered scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logo, social media links (Instagram, Behance, LinkedIn), smooth-scroll navigation links, and contact info including email and location.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with animated headline, subheading, decorative blobs, and CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to the Work and About sections.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware background, smooth-scroll nav links, a 'Hire Me' CTA button, and a collapsible mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Portfolio.tsx: Portfolio section that fetches items via a custom hook, supports category filtering (All, Branding, Social Media, Print Media), and displays them in a masonry-style column grid with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Services section displaying three offering cards (Logo Design, Poster Design, Social Media Management) with scroll-triggered animations, color-coded icons, and feature bullet lists.
frontend/src/components/Skills.tsx: Renders a 'Skills' section displaying four Adobe/CorelDRAW design tools as animated cards with custom SVG icons and proficiency level bars, using scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context backed by DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/usePortfolioItems.ts: Custom hook that fetches the list of portfolio items from the backend actor using React Query, with a 30-second stale time.
frontend/src/hooks/usePortfolioMutations: Custom hook exposing add, replace, edit, and delete mutations for portfolio items, each invalidating the portfolioItems query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track when a referenced element enters the viewport, returning a ref and an isVisible boolean for scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens (sky, coral, ink, surface) in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page that requires Internet Identity authentication, providing a header with logout, a quick upload form for new portfolio items, and a portfolio grid with edit/delete/replace capabilities.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login page that uses Internet Identity for authentication, redirecting to the dashboard on success and showing a branded login card with a passkey-based sign-in button.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Plus Jakarta Sans, Syne), an oklch-based color palette (sky, coral, ink, surface), custom box shadows, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 15) describing the Sulekha Sahoo portfolio site's existing features, architecture notes, and the in-progress Admin Dashboard with Internet Identity login and portfolio image management.
